## What does this PR do?

A brief description of the change.

## Related Issue

Closes #___

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] Refactor (no functional change)

## Checklist

- [ ] `npx vite build` passes (run from `app/`)
- [ ] No new npm dependencies added (or discussed in issue first)
- [ ] No ML library dependencies added (Python stdlib only)
- [ ] Tested locally at localhost:5180
- [ ] Commit messages follow conventional commits (`feat:`, `fix:`, `docs:`, etc.)
- [ ] Updated README if needed

## Screenshots / Demo

If this is a UI change, include before/after screenshots.
